levels.low: Routing and moderation only; no synthesis or generation required
levels.medium: Standard contribution; analysis and synthesis without deep implementation
levels.high: Implementation-bearing or convergence-critical; sustained reasoning required
levels.xhigh: Convergent gate or reviewer pass; one bad judgment propagates; elevate before speaking
levels.max: Reserved for explicit escalation; not assigned by default

pa.Discussion: optional tail turn; admitted via reviewerOptionalPhases at high effort
pa.Action Plan: not on roster by default; admitted as optional reviewer at xhigh when Action Plan is included in reviewerOptionalPhases via /collab set reviewer-optional-phases
pa.Handoff: not on roster by default; admitted as optional reviewer at xhigh when Handoff is included in reviewerOptionalPhases via /collab set reviewer-optional-phases
pa.Completion: convergent reviewer gate; xhigh is required, not advisory; covers Completion.execution sub-state
pa.Completion.verification: reviewer seal pass; xhigh is required; mandatory-declaration turn; one bad judgment stales the seal and blocks close
